news.title:
CLSA notes Vedanta best positioned for aluminium upside amid Middle East conflict, with valuation at ₹1,030 vs base case ₹835.
Aluminium up 4% this week, bucking trend as metals like gold, silver, copper, and zinc face declines amidst geopolitical tensions.
news.summary:
CLSA notes Vedanta best positioned for aluminium upside amid Middle East conflict, with valuation at ₹1,030 vs base case ₹835.
Aluminium up 4% this week, bucking trend as metals like gold, silver, copper, and zinc face declines amidst geopolitical tensions.

news.title:
Nalco, Hindalco, Vedanta shares may react as Qatalum halts aluminium production, raising supply concerns.
US-Iran conflict disrupts Gulf aluminium output, potentially affecting Indian producers tied to global trends.
news.summary:
Nalco, Hindalco, Vedanta shares may react as Qatalum halts aluminium production, raising supply concerns.
US-Iran conflict disrupts Gulf aluminium output, potentially affecting Indian producers tied to global trends.

news.title:
Vedanta Ltd shared its February 2026 update with key insights under SEBI norms.
Details are available on the company's website and stock exchanges.
news.summary:
Vedanta Ltd shared its February 2026 update with key insights under SEBI norms.
Details are available on the company's website and stock exchanges.

news.title:
Vedanta Chairman Anil Agarwal highlights India's 90% oil import dependence, exposing it to geopolitical shocks, urging domestic energy prioritization.
Agarwal calls for regulatory reforms in resource development, citing employment benefits and economic stability amid rising oil, gas, and gold import costs.
news.summary:
Vedanta Chairman Anil Agarwal highlights India's 90% oil import dependence, exposing it to geopolitical shocks, urging domestic energy prioritization.
Agarwal calls for regulatory reforms in resource development, citing employment benefits and economic stability amid rising oil, gas, and gold import costs.

news.title:
Vedanta declared Preferred Bidder for Karnapodikonda bauxite block in Odisha.
Block covers 532.7 hectares, supports strategic backward integration for Vedanta's Aluminium business.
news.summary:
Vedanta declared Preferred Bidder for Karnapodikonda bauxite block in Odisha.
Block covers 532.7 hectares, supports strategic backward integration for Vedanta's Aluminium business.

news.title:
Metal stocks surged 7% as US tariff uncertainty boosted buying momentum.
Analysts suggest buying on dips with potential upside of up to 25%.
news.summary:
Metal stocks surged 7% as US tariff uncertainty boosted buying momentum.
Analysts suggest buying on dips with potential upside of up to 25%.

news.title:
CRISIL reaffirmed Vedanta's long-term rating at AA and short-term at A1.
Ratings remained unchanged as per the Feb 25, 2026 release by CRISIL.
news.summary:
CRISIL reaffirmed Vedanta's long-term rating at AA and short-term at A1.
Ratings remained unchanged as per the Feb 25, 2026 release by CRISIL.

news.title:
Vedanta's board approves ₹3,000 crore NCD issuance for private sale.
The NCDs are set to be listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE).
news.summary:
Vedanta's board approves ₹3,000 crore NCD issuance for private sale.
The NCDs are set to be listed on the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE).

news.title:
Citi assigns Overweight rating to Vedanta, citing 15% upside potential, and Underweight rating to JSW Steel citing limited gains.
BofA upgraded Vedanta to Buy, raised target by 75% to ₹840, driven by bullish aluminium, silver prices, and strong dividend yield.
news.summary:
Citi assigns Overweight rating to Vedanta, citing 15% upside potential, and Underweight rating to JSW Steel citing limited gains.
BofA upgraded Vedanta to Buy, raised target by 75% to ₹840, driven by bullish aluminium, silver prices, and strong dividend yield.

news.title:
Nifty Metal index gained 7.6% in February; Tata Steel, Adani Ent., Jindal Steel, Lloyds advanced 10-13%.
Brokerages favor JSW Steel, Vedanta, Lloyds with strong demand, price hikes, and growth prospects driving optimism.
news.summary:
Nifty Metal index gained 7.6% in February; Tata Steel, Adani Ent., Jindal Steel, Lloyds advanced 10-13%.
Brokerages favor JSW Steel, Vedanta, Lloyds with strong demand, price hikes, and growth prospects driving optimism.

news.title: BoFA upgrades Vedanta to 'buy' and increases its price target by 75%.
news.summary: BoFA upgrades Vedanta to 'buy' and increases its price target by 75%.

news.title:
Vedanta plans to raise ₹30B via short-term bonds by March-end.
This marks Vedanta's second bond issuance in the current fiscal year.
news.summary:
Vedanta plans to raise ₹30B via short-term bonds by March-end.
This marks Vedanta's second bond issuance in the current fiscal year.

news.title:
Vedanta cuts aluminium business FY EBITDA guidance from $4B to $2.7B.
Revised FY27 and FY28 projections are $3.6B and $4.1B, reflecting slower growth.
news.summary:
Vedanta cuts aluminium business FY EBITDA guidance from $4B to $2.7B.
Revised FY27 and FY28 projections are $3.6B and $4.1B, reflecting slower growth.

news.title: Vedanta plans a board meeting on 25 February 2026.
news.summary: Vedanta plans a board meeting on 25 February 2026.

news.title: Vedanta aims to stabilize oil and gas output before its mega demerger.
news.summary: Vedanta aims to stabilize oil and gas output before its mega demerger.

Vedanta Ltd shared an investor presentation on capital expenditure plans.
The presentation, accessible on Vedanta's website, highlights business performance impact.

news.title:
Vedanta, Hindalco, JSW Steel, Tata Steel may react to US tariff rollback plans on steel, aluminium.
BHEL won LoA from SAIL for power plant; Bharti Airtel's unit got RBI nod as NBFC Type II.
news.summary:

news.title:
Jindal Power, Vedanta, and Havells are among 22 bidders for Gupta Power.
Gupta Power faces 4,240 crore debtor claims and is undergoing proceedings.
news.summary:
Jindal Power, Vedanta, and Havells are among 22 bidders for Gupta Power.
Gupta Power faces 4,240 crore debtor claims and is undergoing proceedings.

news.title:
Vedanta Resources disclosed the creation of encumbrances on Vedanta Ltd shares held by its subsidiaries under a $350M facility agreement, effective Jan 30, 2026.
No pledge has been created on Vedanta Ltd shares, and VRL Group must maintain at least 50.1% ownership per SEBI Takeover Regulations.
news.summary:
Vedanta Resources disclosed the creation of encumbrances on Vedanta Ltd shares held by its subsidiaries under a $350M facility agreement, effective Jan 30, 2026.
No pledge has been created on Vedanta Ltd shares, and VRL Group must maintain at least 50.1% ownership per SEBI Takeover Regulations.

news.title:
India Inc's Q3FY26 profits rose 14.7% YoY, highest in 8 quarters.
Growth driven by public OMCs, banks, non-bank lenders, and metals/mining firms.
news.summary:
India Inc's Q3FY26 profits rose 14.7% YoY, highest in 8 quarters.
